name: 1771010749812.pdf
text:
Ishwar Birari 
       Software Developer 
   ishwar.b@careeritjob.com               682-248-0049                LinkedIn               GitHub 
SUMMARY
Software Developer with 2+ years of experience building full -stack applications using React, Redux, Spring Boot, and Node.js. Expertise in 
RESTful API development, MySQL query optimization, and Kafka event-driven architecture. Proficient with Jest and JUnit testing frameworks, 
JWT authentication, and Agile development delivering responsive interfaces and scalable backend services. 
SKILLS 
Methodologies: SDLC, Agile, Waterfall 
Programming Languages: Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, SQL 
Frontend: React.js, Angular, HTML5, CSS3 
Backend: Spring Boot, Spring MVC, Hibernate, Spring Security, GraphQL, Django, Node.js, Flask  
APIs & Architecture: RESTful APIs, Microservices, JWT, OAuth2, JSON 
Databases: MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Oracle Database, SQL Server 
Cloud & DevOps: AWS (EC2, S3, RDS), Docker, Jenkins, Git, GitHub 
Build & Tools: Maven, Gradle, Postman, IntelliJ IDEA, JIRA 
Testing Tools: JUnit, Mockito, Jest, Spring Boot Test 
Version Control and CI/CD Tools: Git, GitHub, Jenkins, GitHub Actions, Docker 
EDUCATION 
Master of Science in Computer Science | University of Texas at Arlington, Texas.                                                                              May 2026 
Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Engineering | Savitribai Phule Pune University, India                                                        August 2023 
PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE  
Software Developer | CVS Health, Texas                                                                                                                                 October 2025 - Current 
• Developed 8 responsive React components for patient appointment booking with Redux state management, JWT 
authentication, and RESTful API integration displaying real-time provider availability across clinic scheduling system. 
• Optimized MySQL query performance for appointment search by adding composite indexes and rewriting JOIN operations, 
reducing execution time through database profiling and analysis. 
• Added event handler logic to existing Kafka consumer service for appointment notifications , implemented error logging and 
monitoring for message failures, contributed to Node.js microservice within notification delivery system. 
• Wrote 15 Jest unit and integration tests for React components and Express API endpoints, achieved 90% code coverage fo r 
appointment module, resolved bugs during Agile sprint testing cycles. 
• Developed patient dashboard using React Hooks and Chart.js for appointment history visualization, implemented responsive 
CSS Grid layouts, integrated RESTful APIs retrieving patient records, prescriptions, and lab results. 
Software Developer | Citus Infotech, India                                                                                                September 2022 - August 2024 
• Developed banking transaction module using Spring MVC framework enabling account balance inquiries, fund transfers, and transaction 
history features for retail banking application serving customers across multiple branches. 
• Built RESTful web services using  Spring Boot  for mobile banking application integration, implemented input validation and exception 
handling mechanisms ensuring data integrity throughout transaction processing workflows. 
• Created front-end screens using Angular framework with form controls and data tables for transaction management, consumed REST APIs 
from backend services, and implemented client-side validations. 
• Optimized database queries for account lookup operations by adding indexes, worked with senior developers on performance tuni ng 
activities, and maintained MySQL database schema for application data storage. 
• Wrote unit tests using JUnit and Mockito achieving 75% code coverage, fixed bugs identified during testing phases, and participated in 
Agile sprint activities throughout development lifecycle. 
ACADEMIC PROJECTS 
AI/ML Chatbot for Emotional Assistance Objective  (Link): Developed AI-powered emotional support chatbot using NLP, LSTM, 
and GRU models for sentiment analysis. Implemented Python and NLTK for text preprocessing. Built on TensorFlow, delivering 
scalable, real-time emotional assistance through intelligent conversational interactions. 
Cloud-Native AI SAAS Deployment Objective  (Link): Engineered pr oduction-grade NLP model deployment using Kubernetes 
microservices across AWS and GCP. Implemented GitOps workflows, API Gateway, and Datadog observability. Integrated 
Snowflake Intelligence for real-time insights, optimizing ML pipeline performance under dynamic workloads. 
Web ChatGPT (OpenAI 4.29), AI -Powered Web Chat Application Objective  (Link): Built intelligent web chat application 
integrating Chat  Engine with OpenAI GPT -3.5. Enables human -to-human and AI -assisted messaging with responsive UI, secure 
handling, and scalable architecture for enhanced conversational experiences.  
DINE DISCOVER: Designed and developed a restaurant discovery web applicati on using PHP and the Yelp API to deliver real -time 
restaurant search and recommendations. Optimized API queries to efficiently handle high request volumes while ensuring fast 
response times. Enhanced application security by implementing prepared SQL statem ents. 
CERTIFICATIONS 
• Google Cloud Fundamentals 
• Cyber security framework by National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST)  
• Oracle wdp 
• Python for machine learning by Great Learning
